body: Hey Amara, hope the week is treating you well. I wanted to loop back on the [Verdant Systems](companies/verdant-systems) deal we were both looking at — our team finished diligence last week and we're feeling pretty constructive on the grid-edge software layer they're building. I know [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been active in that intersection of climate infrastructure and AI-driven grid management, so I'm curious whether you're still tracking this one or if it fell off your radar after the holidays. We're thinking about leading the Series A at somewhere in the $18–22M range and would love a co-lead conversation if there's appetite on your end. Happy to share our diligence memo if that helps move things along — just let me know and I'll send it over. Would a quick call later this week or early next work?
